{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Skysworn foundry
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] raided the [[Skysworn foundry]] for a [[Blackflame]] [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
